# ProtocolRevision.Supported property

The revisions this SDK is willing to accept, most-preferred first. A server advertises this list as `supportedVersions` in discovery (§5.3.2); a client selects from it (§5.4).

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> Supported { get; }
```
